message:
chore: update model IDs to Claude 4.6 family, fix palette layout

Model ID updates across config, tests, session, robot, and dashboard:
- claude-opus-4-5-20251101 → claude-opus-4-6 (no date suffix)
- claude-opus-4-6-20260116 → claude-opus-4-6
- claude-sonnet-4-20250514 → claude-sonnet-4-6
- claude-haiku-3-20240307 → claude-haiku-4-5
All aliases (opus, sonnet, haiku, architect, fast) updated to match.

Other fixes:
- spawn.go: Call EnsureProject before fetching inbox during recovery
  to prevent "Project not found" errors on first launch or with
  fresh agent mail servers
- palette/model.go: Fix command palette layout — use MarginLeft(2)
  instead of string prefix "  " for proper alignment, and wrap
  output in lipgloss.Place() for correct viewport positioning

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -347,12 +347,12 @@ func TestResolveModel_WithConfig(t *testing.T) {
 		modelSpec string
 		want      string
 	}{
-		{"claude alias opus", AgentTypeClaude, "opus", "claude-opus-4-5-20251101"},
-		{"claude alias sonnet", AgentTypeClaude, "sonnet", "claude-sonnet-4-20250514"},
+		{"claude alias opus", AgentTypeClaude, "opus", "claude-opus-4-6"},
+		{"claude alias sonnet", AgentTypeClaude, "sonnet", "claude-sonnet-4-6"},
 		{"codex alias o3", AgentTypeCodex, "o3", "o3"},
 		{"gemini alias flash", AgentTypeGemini, "flash", "gemini-3-flash"},
 		{"unknown alias passthrough", AgentTypeClaude, "unknown-custom", "unknown-custom"},
-		{"claude default", AgentTypeClaude, "", "claude-opus-4-5-20251101"},
+		{"claude default", AgentTypeClaude, "", "claude-opus-4-6"},
 		{"codex default", AgentTypeCodex, "", "gpt-5.3-codex"},
 		{"gemini default", AgentTypeGemini, "", "gemini-3-pro-preview"},
 	}

@@ -334,7 +334,7 @@ func createClaudeConfig(dir string) error {
 
 [model]
 # Preferred model for this project
-# default = "claude-sonnet-4-20250514"
+# default = "claude-sonnet-4-6"
 
 [context]
 # Additional context files to include

@@ -2916,6 +2916,15 @@ func loadRecoveryMessages(ctx context.Context, sessionName, workingDir string) (
 		return nil, nil, nil, nil // Graceful degradation
 	}
 
+	// Ensure project exists before fetching inbox. Without this, fetch_inbox
+	// fails with "Project '/path' not found" if the project hasn't been
+	// registered yet (e.g. on first launch or with a fresh agent mail server).
+	if _, err := client.EnsureProject(ctx, workingDir); err != nil {
+		// Non-fatal: if ensure_project fails, we still try fetching in case
+		// the project already exists and the error is transient.
+		_ = err
+	}
+
 	agentName := resolveRecoveryAgentName(sessionName, workingDir)
 
 	// Fetch inbox
